name: Poisson Au Champagne
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Champagne, extra dry or brut
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together 2 teaspoons flour and 2 teaspoons butter; reserve.
2. Generously butter a baking dish large enough to hold the fish.
3. Arrange fillets, covering with onion and lemon slices, season with salt and pepper, thyme, and add bay leaf.
4. Pour in 1-1/2 cups Champagne.
5. Place fish in preheated oven at 400 degrees. Check after 10 minutes. Fish cooks very quickly this way and cannot be allowed to brown.
6. Remove when milky white and flakes to fork. Discard lemon and onion but drain juice into a small saucepan.
7. Keep fish warm. Concentrate the juice over the stove, thickening with dabs of flour-butter mix.
8. Add 1/2 cup Champagne and egg yolks. Thicken by beating over double boiler or over low fire.
9. Cool sauce quickly when done. Spread over fish and serve.
